examples: Walrus need either ice or land to rest.
Each spring, thousands of walruses return to the Walrus Islands in northern Bristol Bay to feed, rest, and sometimes die.
The shaft of the ceremonial mace is the whorled tusk of a narwhal, a small Arctic whale. The door handles are of walrus tusk.
Behind a small display case full of fresh fish stood the heavy-set, walrus-mustachioed owner.
And the staff was worried about Mitik, an orphaned baby walrus the aquarium had recently adopted.
